understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) tile by navigating the grid using horizontal movement and automatic gravity-based falling, while strategically removing breakable tiles with clicks to create paths, all within the turn budget without landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x-coordinate and triggers continuous falling in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y) until landing on a safe tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks at target positions without advancing movement timers. Hazards (spikes) cause instant loss on landing. UNDO reverts actions. The state tracks landing positions, corridor passages, and remaining steps; the episode ends when steps reach zero or the goal/hazard condition is met.
